stemHtml: What does the term "clearance limit" mean?

options.a: The time of expiry of an air traffic control clearance.
options.b: The time at which an aircraft is given an air traffic control clearance.
options.c: The point to which an aircraft is granted an air traffic control clearance.
options.d: The time after which an air traffic control clearance will be automatically cancelled, if the flight has not been commenced.
